title: Kingston Spring Music Festival
description: An outdoor evening of local bands, food vendors, and community performances to launch the spring festival season.

title: Downtown Coding Workshop
description: A beginner-friendly coding workshop focused on web development basics, debugging, and collaborative practice.

title: Waterfront Food Market
description: A public food market featuring local restaurants, dessert booths, and live entertainment along the waterfront.

title: Career Networking Night
description: Students and employers meet for short networking conversations, industry talks, and resume feedback.

title: Community Art Showcase
description: A public showcase of student and local artist work, including painting, photography, and mixed media exhibits.

title: Summer Startup Panel
description: Founders and startup mentors share lessons on product design, funding, and building a small business team.

title: Family Movie In The Park
description: Bring blankets and lawn chairs for an outdoor movie night designed for families and community visitors.

title: August Design Sprint Demo Day
description: Teams present design sprint prototypes, explain their decisions, and gather feedback from invited guests.
